title: Summit Ridge Resort: Well-Spread Lift Tower Layout
strategies: ring baseline: N towers equally spaced on a circle of radius 0.45 about the plot center (reproduces the checker baseline; min area is a thin 3-consecutive-vertex sliver)
multi-restart uniform random sampling inside the unit square, keeping the layout with the largest minimum triangle area, floored at the ring baseline

bottleneck-driven local search: from the best random restart, repeatedly locate the smallest-area triple and nudge one of its three towers, accepting only moves that raise the global minimum triangle area, over many seeded steps
structured Heilbronn-style constructions (corners + edge/interior lattices, perturbed grids) tuned to avoid thin triangles across the whole square
